summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Next.js e-commerce application with focus on mobile responsiveness and new features. Backend APIs working perfectly. Related Products and Notification Banner implemented successfully. Mobile grid layouts working correctly. One mobile header responsiveness issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Search form remains visible on mobile instead of being hidden with expandable search icon
ui_bugs.details: Search bar should be hidden on mobile (md:hidden) and replaced with a search icon button that expands the search when clicked

passed_tests: Products API - Pagination and filtering working
Product ramlogo API - YouTube video and customizations confirmed
Notification Subscribe API - New endpoint working correctly
Product Page - Related Products section showing 5 products
Product Page - Notification Banner with email subscription working
Product Page - Add to cart functionality working
Category Page - 2-column mobile grid layout confirmed
Categories Navigation - Active state highlighting working
Desktop Header - Full search bar visible
Product interactions - Buttons clickable and functional
Homepage - Loading correctly with all navigation
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (8/8 API endpoints), Frontend: 90% (1 mobile responsiveness issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile header responsiveness: Hide search form on mobile screens and implement expandable search icon behavior. The search form should be hidden with 'hidden md:block' classes and a search icon button should be visible on mobile that expands the search when clicked.
